title: Smeltable Ore Blocks
description: Annoyed that you can't smelt raw ore blocks? Now you can!
body: This Datapack adds 3 new Recipes. You are able to smelt Raw Ore Blocks into a Block instantly, without having to craft the Raw Ore Block into 9x Pieces, and then smelt them. This makes smelting Copper, Iron and Gold 9x times faster.
